'''Blotho''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] working for [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. He was a cousin of [[Brollo]].

He participated in fights between [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] and mercenaries, where others could bet on, despite the [[Stormtrooper_commander/Legends|Commander]] ordered them to stop.<ref name="Dark Forces: Rebel Agent">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref><ref name="Dark Forces: Rebel Agent audio drama">[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]]</ref>
